name: Low-Calorie Spiced Tea Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir until well blended.
2. Store the mixture in an airtight container.
3. For each serving, add 1 tablespoon of the mix to a cup.
4. Pour 1 cup of hot water into the cup and stir well.
5. Serve immediately.
Food Exchange Per Serving: FREE; CAL: 1; CAR: TR; PRO: TR; FAT: TR; SOD: 1 MG
